'''Cha'a drone ships''' were unmanned trade vessels used in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] by [[Cha'a]] merchants.
They were also used by [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] to transport prisoners to [[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]].

One such vessel was the ''[[Zeta Five]]'', registered to the [[Merchant Lord]] [[Ssk Kahorr]] on
[[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]]. It was destroyed by solar flares while passing close to [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]]
en route to the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony on [[Goluud Minor]].

{{Ship-stub}}
